full_text:
Zhang Bao 張苞
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Bao (張苞). Turned on Li Jue and launched a surprise attack, he failed to get a fire going. Zhang Bao was affiliated with Li Jue and Guo Si.
